emergencyChargeVoltageV_help: When ANY pack drops below this critical voltage, emergency charging starts (typical: 2.8V for LFP)
emergencyChargePowerW_help: Charging power during emergency mode (ignores grid target)
emergencyExitSoc_help: At this SOC level, emergency charging ends and recovery mode begins
emergencyRecoverySoc_help: Until this SOC is reached, only charging is allowed (no discharge). Prevents endless loop after emergency
useLowVoltageBlock_help: When device signals 'lowVoltageBlock=true', stop discharging immediately (device protection)
useFullChargeNeeded_help: When device signals 'fullChargeNeeded=true', force full charge cycle (battery calibration)
dischargeProtectionMode_help: Choose how to protect battery from deep discharge: by SOC percentage or by pack cell voltage
minBatteryVoltageV_help: Stop discharging when ANY pack falls below this voltage (voltage mode only). Typical: 3.0V for LFP
emergencyCharging_hint: 🚨 Emergency charging activates on: critical pack voltage, device flags (lowVoltageBlock/fullChargeNeeded). Has highest priority and ignores grid target!
emergencyRecovery_hint: 🔄 Recovery phase: After emergency (from exit SOC), battery continues charging with normal grid target, but discharge is blocked until recovery SOC. Prevents endless loop.
